data.name: EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED
data.value: An account with this email address already exists.

data.name: NO_PASSWORD_SET
data.value: This account uses Google Sign-In. Please log in with Google.

data.name: INVALID_TOKEN
data.value: Your session is no longer valid. Please log in again.

data.name: TOKEN_EXPIRED
data.value: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

data.name: GOOGLE_AUTH_FAILED
data.value: Google Sign-In failed. Please try again.

data.name: SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
data.value: An external service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
